CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Address_Concatenated__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Address_Concatenated__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Parent.Address_Concatenated__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Address_Concatenated__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)), Parent.Address_Concatenated__c, NULL ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Ultimate Parent Company Address
